chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – Al-Zahaar (likening the wife as a mother)

text: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ عَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ الظِّهَارُ لَا يَقَعُ عَلَى الْغَضَبِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Abu Nasr,
(It has been narrated) from Al-Rezaasws having said: ‘The Zahaar does not occur upon the anger’.
